decisions.title: Use Redis for caching
decisions.summary: The team decided to implement Redis as the caching solution to ensure session recovery through data persistence.
decisions.rationale: Redis supports persistence which is necessary for session recovery.

decisions.title: Select GitHub Actions for CI
decisions.summary: The team has chosen GitHub Actions as the CI provider over CircleCI and Buildkite.
decisions.rationale: GitHub Actions is free at the current usage tier and provides better integration by being located alongside the repository.

decisions.title: Standardize on TypeScript for new services
decisions.summary: The team has decided to use TypeScript as the mandatory standard for all new services to improve type safety and tooling.
decisions.rationale: Recent runtime bugs in the payments script and the superior tooling payoff of TypeScript.
decisions.alternatives: Staying on plain JavaScript with JSDoc annotations.

decisions.title: Adopt Tailwind and shadcn
decisions.summary: The team has decided to use Tailwind and shadcn for the design system instead of building custom components.
decisions.rationale: It is faster to ship and the team is already familiar with these tools.

decisions.title: Choose Slack over other services
decisions.summary: The team has officially decided to use Slack as their primary communication platform.
decisions.rationale: It is considered better than other available services.

commitments.what: Set up the GitHub Actions pipeline
write the onboarding doc for new contributors
